params.prompt:
Generate a compliance vulnerability management report for audit submission, mapping steps to PCI-DSS controls (11 and 6). Include sections: regular scanning (using nuclei), classification with severity and CVSS, SLA values (Critical ≤7 days, High ≤30 days, Medium ≤90 days) as required by PCI DSS 6.3, the vulnerability management cycle (identify, assess, remediate, re-validate, repeat), mention virtual patching via ModSecurity, and ensure the report contains the line 'SLA' to satisfy audit criteria.
Provide the output in plain text suitable for inclusion in a document.
params.system: You are an assistant that generates compliance reports.
